meta.data_note: Per-town data from 132,118-ballot CVR sample (~99.9% of 132,250 total ballots); scaled to official Maine SOS district totals. Official R1 and Final round totals from SOS RCV Report (certified 2018-06-22); intermediate rounds estimated from sample ballot proportions.

popups.text: Janet Mills absorbs the most of Donna Dion & Mark Dion & Diane Russell & Write-in's 10,272 combined ballots district-wide.
Elizabeth Sweet absorbs the most of Mark Eves's 17,887 combined ballots district-wide.
Janet Mills absorbs the most of Elizabeth Sweet's 20,767 combined ballots district-wide.
Janet Mills crosses the majority threshold of continuing ballots to win the district.

UOCAVA_UNMAPPED.label: UOCAVA / Unmapped Ballots
UOCAVA_UNMAPPED.description: Ballots included in race totals but not assigned to a Maine municipality. Includes overseas and military ballots (UOCAVA) and any precincts with only numeric identifiers in the CVR.
